text.title: X / Twitter Ads Strategy Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real ads-twitter-ads engagements. Each pairs a symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: DTC consumer product runs on X; CPA 4x Meta; budget burns.
antipattern.root-cause: Channel chosen for novelty, not audience fit.
antipattern.fix: Move budget to Meta; X only for tech/B2B/crypto verticals.

antipattern.symptom: Ad appears next to extremist thread; PR fire.
antipattern.fix: Always attach exclusion list before launch.

antipattern.symptom: Tweet copy with 6 emojis; classifier downranks; CTR halved.
